functional_audit.check: path_enrollment_status enum module exports all 4 IR values with typed slugs, Bubble id traceability, and IR-accurate display labels
ai_coaching_mode_os and ai_confidence_level_os exported with correct slug/label pairs for chat/paths UI selectors
state_energy_level_os and state_nervous_system_os available as typed exports for journal/check-in components

critiques.finding: No prototype pages or components import from the new ENUM-03 modules yet; OnboardingStateSignals.tsx still hardcodes nervous_system_state and energy_level_signal option slugs inline (values match but bypass centralized LABELS/ORDER).
critiques.alternative: Wire OnboardingStateSignals and future Paths badge components to import STATE_NERVOUS_SYSTEM_*, STATE_ENERGY_LEVEL_*, and PATH_ENROLLMENT_STATUS_* from @/lib/enums in a follow-up consumer item.

critiques.finding: Bubble value id → slug reverse lookup is only available via inline comments; no exported BY_BUBBLE_ID maps for adapter layers receiving Bubble option value ids.
critiques.alternative: Add optional PATH_ENROLLMENT_STATUS_BY_BUBBLE_ID (and siblings) if Supabase/API payloads carry Bubble option value ids, mirroring ENUM-01/04 pattern.

critiques.finding: Most LABELS maps use lowercase db_value strings where Bubble display equals db_value; state_nervous_system_os correctly uses title-case display strings (Wired, Shut Down). Consistent with Bubble but differs from onboarding question enums that carry long descriptive labels.
critiques.alternative: If path/chat selectors need human-facing copy beyond Bubble display strings, add separate DESCRIPTIONS maps in a downstream UI item.
